SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

HADI R. SEYED-ALI, Esq. appeared for plaintiff HSBC BANK USA, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant SUSAN PETERSON, ANDREW PETERSON.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff HSBC BANK USA, and against the Defaulted Defendant SUSAN PETERSON, ANDREW PETERSON as follows:

RESTITUTION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 2243 GREENWICH STREET, SF, CA 94133; RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED; LEASE IS FORFEITED

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of MAR-07-2011 remains on calendar.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RANDALL T. GARTEISER OF SINGER & GARTEISER, TEL. NO. 655-9785 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND ANDREW PETERSON.

RULING- THE MATTER WAS CALLED THREE TIMES. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER, THE DEFENDANT WAS ALLOWED TO SHOW OFFER OF PROOF. ON THE THIRD TIME THE MATTER WAS CALLED AT AROUND 12:45 P.M., DEFENDANT WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT ANDREW PETERSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AND TO FILE ANSWER BY MAY 20, 2010. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joyce D. Long, CSR # 8620 =301/PJB
